title: Iteration Plan: Release 6.2.3
user_request: Submit the completed slot-based governance artifact workflow as a new Project Governor patch version.
existing_behavior: Current public plugin metadata and documentation point at version 6.2.2.
Release metadata is tracked in CHANGELOG.md, releases/<version>.md, releases/FEATURE_MATRIX.json, README files, tests, and docs/upgrades/UPGRADE_REGISTER.md.
The completed feature adds deterministic governance artifact rendering and revision-checked slot updates, with context-indexer read-side optimization for generated Markdown.

reuse_patterns.reuse: Publish a low-risk patch release with feature matrix, release notes, README refs, tests, and upgrade advisory evidence.
Keep Codex and Claude plugin surfaces and version assertions aligned.
Use the new artifact renderer for this release task plan.

files_not_to_change: releases/MIGRATIONS.json unless a project migration is required
Historical release note bodies for older versions
Deterministic helper output schemas beyond the already documented 6.2.3 feature work

new_files.why: Each released version has a dedicated release note.
The release needs a task-local plan and evidence.
The release needs task-local verification evidence.

tests: python3 -m compileall tools skills tests claude

risks.text: Codex, Claude, README, feature matrix, and test version strings can drift.
risks.status: mitigated by targeted version assertions and self-test

risks.text: The release touches AGENTS/template rules and must not imply blind initialized-project overwrites.
risks.status: mitigated by feature matrix migration metadata and upgrade-register notes

rollback: Revert the 6.2.3 version bump, release note, feature matrix entry, upgrade register row, README/test version refs, and release task evidence.
